# Spatula Individual Contributor License Agreement

**Accidentally Awesome Labs — Individual Contributor License Agreement v1**

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Spatula, a project maintained by
Accidentally Awesome Labs ("the Project").

This Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") documents the rights granted by you
("Contributor") to Accidentally Awesome Labs with respect to your Contributions. This
Agreement is for your protection as a Contributor as well as for the protection of
Accidentally Awesome Labs and its users; it does not change your rights to use your own
Contributions for any other purpose.

Please read this Agreement carefully before signing or acknowledging it through the
repository's configured CLA process. If you have questions, contact legal@spatula.dev.

---

## 1. Definitions

**"Contribution"** means any original work of authorship, including any modifications or
additions to an existing work, that you intentionally submit to the Project for inclusion
in, or documentation of, any of the products owned or managed by Accidentally Awesome
Labs.

**"Submit"** means any form of electronic, verbal, or written communication sent to
Accidentally Awesome Labs or its representatives, including but not limited to
communication on electronic mailing lists, source code control systems, and issue
tracking systems managed by or on behalf of Accidentally Awesome Labs.

---

## 2. Grant of Copyright License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, you hereby grant to Accidentally
Awesome Labs and to recipients of software distributed by Accidentally Awesome Labs a
perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright
license to reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform,
sublicense, and distribute your Contributions and such derivative works.

---

## 3. Grant of Patent License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, you hereby grant to Accidentally
Awesome Labs and to recipients of software distributed by Accidentally Awesome Labs a
perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable (except as
stated in this section) patent license to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell,
import, and otherwise transfer the work, where such license applies only to those patent
claims licensable by you that are necessarily infringed by your Contribution(s) alone or
by combination of your Contribution(s) with the project to which such Contribution(s)
were submitted.

---

## 4. Retention of Your Copyright

You retain ownership of the copyright in your Contributions. This Agreement does not
transfer copyright ownership to Accidentally Awesome Labs; it grants Accidentally Awesome
Labs the license rights described above.

---

## 5. Representations and Warranties

You represent and warrant that:

1. **Original work** — Each of your Contributions is your original creation. You have
   sufficient rights to grant the licenses described in this Agreement.
2. **No encumbrances** — To the best of your knowledge, your Contributions do not
   infringe the intellectual property rights of any third party.
3. **Employment / contracts** — If your employer(s) has rights to intellectual property
   that you create (including your Contributions), you represent that you have received
   permission to make Contributions on behalf of that employer, or that your employer has
   waived such rights for your Contributions to the Project.
4. **Third-party content** — If your Contribution includes or is based on any source code,
   images, or other material that is not your original creation, you will provide complete
   details in writing to Accidentally Awesome Labs at the time you submit the Contribution
   (e.g., in the pull request description), including the source and applicable license.

---

## 6. Disclaimer

EXCEPT FOR THE EXPRESS WARRANTIES IN SECTION 5, TO THE EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE
LAW, YOUR CONTRIBUTIONS ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR
CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY
WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, MERCHANTABILITY, OR FITNESS FOR A
PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

---

## 7. Signing

By signing or acknowledging this Agreement through the repository's configured CLA
process on your pull request, you agree to the terms of this Agreement with respect to
your current and future Contributions to the Project.

Signing is required once per major CLA version. If the `version` field in this file's
frontmatter is incremented, you will be asked to re-sign on your next pull request.

---
